question: Can equal frontier-family bridge coverage improve when visible traces are selected to discriminate against hard aliases and seed-adapter mistakes, while keeping the same 240-record posttraining budget?

conditions.static_bridge_lora: 180 base-family records plus 60 equally allocated normal frontier bridge records
conditions.alias_discriminative_bridge_lora: 180 base-family records plus 60 equally allocated hard-case frontier records selected against an expanded alias bank
conditions.model_discriminative_bridge_lora: 180 base-family records plus 60 equally allocated hard-case frontier records selected against seed-adapter wrong programs plus the alias bank

evaluation.selection: valid candidate with most visible-case passes; tie-break by shorter parsed DSL
